summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job is not a dedupe cluster, merge/fix/low-signal closure are disabled, and no shared canonical was selected. Open PRs are kept for normal maintainer review or follow-up; the single hydrated security-sensitive linked issue is routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref is out of ProjectClownfish backlog-cleanup scope.
Standalone open PR needing proof; no safe close, merge, or fix action is available in plan mode.
Small independent docs PR should remain open for maintainer review; no close-style action is authorized.
Active maintainer-owned feature PR with review issues; keep open independently.
Substantive draft maintainer PR; keep open for maintainer workflow.
Independent small bugfix PR with no closure basis; keep for review.
Independent performance PR should remain open for review.
Related to the already-merged #88347 path, but still open and draft with unresolved review state; no close action is safe or authorized.
Related follow-up to #81918, not a duplicate; keep open for review rather than close.
Related Windows update repair work with draft/conflict state; keep open for maintainer handling.
Maintainer/product intent judgment is needed for user-pinned model semantics before any cleanup classification beyond keeping it open.

needs_human: #88329: decide whether user-pinned model quota exhaustion should fall back to the global chain, and whether the current dirty PR is the right implementation path.
